label: Start DLT capture (bench script)
description: Start logging DLT from a daemon using your dlt.py script (host + port). Stop it later to attach the .dlt file.

label: Stop DLT capture (bench script)
description: Stop the running dlt.py capture and attach the produced .dlt file to the report.

label: One-shot DLT capture to file
description: Run a single bounded DLT capture via dlt.py and save it to a .dlt file.

label: Start DLT capture (built-in, no script)
description: Connect straight to a DLT daemon over TCP and record — no bench script needed.

label: Stop DLT capture (built-in)
description: Stop the built-in TCP capture started above.

label: Verify pattern in capture
description: Pass/fail the step by searching the captured DLT log for a regex (e.g. BootComplete).

label: Tail last lines of capture
description: Show the last N lines of the captured DLT log in the report.

label: Attach a .dlt file to the report
description: Attach an existing .dlt file (yours or a previous capture) to this run's report.
